content.en:
The battle continues.

Occasionally, there is the fall of the forbidden zerg, and occasionally there is the fall of the Dao ancestor.

However, once a Dao Ancestor falls, the people around him will put away the body of the Dao Ancestor, so as not to be robbed by the Forbidden Zerg.

Since the Dao Ancestors will cooperate with each other and have an advantage in numbers, the number of Dao Ancestors who have fallen is far from being comparable to the Forbidden Zerg.

As time passed, the number of forbidden zerg falls increased, and the advantages of the Dao Ancestors became greater and greater.

But suddenly, the voices of the half-step domain ancestors spread all over the battlefield.

"Retreat all!"

The other Dao Ancestors didn't know what was going on, but they guessed that there must be something wrong with the Half-Step Domain Ancestor battlefield, so they began to evacuate the battlefield one by one.

"Let's withdraw!"

Ye Tian said to Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Ye Yu.

They followed Ye Tian to evacuate quickly, and if there was a taboo Zerg to track them, Ye Tian could easily stop them alone.

Soon, they evacuated the area.

-------------

"There are two lord-level forbidden zergs coming, and we must also withdraw!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor said solemnly.

He knew that the two lord-level forbidden zergs in the distance must be the two forbidden bugs inside the taboo zerg's lair, but he didn't expect them to really come out.

In other words, the Forbidden Zerg gave birth to another lord-level Forbidden Zerg, thus leaving a lord-level Forbidden Zerg to guard the Forbidden Bug Tree.

Therefore, if calculated in this way, the Forbidden Zerg has at least nine lord-level taboo zergs, or even ten-headed lord-level taboo zergs.

And the major bases only have eight half-step domain ancestors, and they don't have an advantage at all.

Once those two lord-level forbidden zergs join the battlefield, they will be completely at a disadvantage, and countless Dao Ancestors will fall and die at that time.

At this time.

The Invincible Dao Ancestors also began to withdraw from the battlefield, not daring to stay here any longer, otherwise they would also fall here.

The eight half-step domain ancestors did their best to intercept those lord-level forbidden zergs, and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestors also gave up hunting the commander-level forbidden zergs, and instead went to intercept the two lord-level forbidden zergs that were about to come.

However, the Shenxu Dao Ancestor quickly fell into a disadvantage and was in a suppressed state, and the two lord-level who arrived were stronger than the ordinary lord-level, plus the two heads arrived together, so the Shenxu Dao Ancestor couldn't beat it.

However, it seems that there is no problem in resisting for a while.

The lord-level forbidden zergs were intercepted, but those commander-level taboo zergs were not intercepted, and they led a large number of taboo zergs to start catching up.

Fortunately, nearly twenty commander-level forbidden zergs were killed before, and there were still more than thirty commander-level forbidden zergs, although the number was much more than the number of invincible Dao ancestors, but at least the gap was not as big as before.

However, the speed of the commander-level forbidden zerg is too fast, and the invincible Dao Ancestors can use some top-level escape treasures to escape smoothly, but some weak Dao Ancestors are too slow, so it is difficult to escape, and they can only disperse.

Once they were caught up, those Dao Ancestors could only fall and die.

......

A group of Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain are retreating, and Ye Tian is supporting the evacuation of these Seven Heavens and Six Heavenly Dao Ancestors, after all, at this time, the strongest Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain can't control these Dao Ancestors of Six or Seven Heavens.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian felt the breath of a commander-level forbidden zerg, all the Dao ancestors who were attacked by the other party fell one by one, and they couldn't compete at all, and this commander-level forbidden zerg came towards Ye Tian's side.

"Hurry up, flee at all costs, don't hide those escape treasures!"

Ye Tian reminded the Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, Dao.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, you go first, you are the hope of our Black Wind Mountain!"

Many Dao Ancestors hurriedly said.

"It's okay, you guys go, I have a way to save my life, these are the forbidden zergs I hunted and the corpses of Dao Ancestors I collected, you take them all away, don't waste time, this is an order! I order you to leave quickly as the Great Heavenly King of Black Wind Mountain!"

Ye Tian ordered.

The Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain did not dare to disobey the order, so they collected Ye Tian's Forbidden Zerg and Dao Ancestor corpses and quickly evacuated.

And at this time, the commander-level forbidden zerg also killed it.

Ye Tian displayed the forbidden realm, the Great Wilderness Law Body and various Dao techniques were displayed one by one, and even the forbidden talent dark spear was opened, and the forbidden spear in his hand was blessed, launching a terrifying blow.

Bang!!!!

This blow directly slowed down the speed of the commander-level forbidden zerg, and finally stopped.

And Ye Tian habitually used the talent of copying to envelop the other party, but he discovered an amazing thing.

"It has a forbidden talent!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

What's more, the other party not only has a forbidden talent: the Dark Spear, but also a forbidden talent - Hidden!

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

Ye Tian instantly copied the other party's two forbidden talents, and this commander-level forbidden zerg also launched an attack on Ye Tian, and a long foot like a spear stabbed in an instant, making Ye Tian unable to dodge it at all.

Poof!

Ye Tian's body was pierced, but he had already gathered a large amount of forbidden origin power in his body, and at the moment when his body was pierced, he instantly mobilized the forbidden origin power to heal his injuries, so he was not killed in an instant, but he was also severely injured and dying.

This commander-level forbidden zerg seemed to be stunned for a moment, as if he was very puzzled why Ye Tian was not poked to death by it like other ants.

So, it raised its long feet again and stabbed at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian recovered his injuries as quickly as possible, and did his best to cast the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step to move a small step, avoiding a blow from the commander-level forbidden zerg in front of him, and survived again.

At this time.

This commander-level forbidden zerg seemed to be enraged, and did not play any more, and quickly stabbed down one by one, turning into afterimages, and the speed was too fast.

This time, Ye Tian didn't dodge and was killed by a direct blow.

After killing Ye Tian, this commander-level forbidden zerg seemed to be very happy and was about to take away Ye Tian's body, but it was surprising to find that Ye Tian's body had dissipated, leaving only a few broken Dao weapons and a small amount of resources.

Oh!!!

The Commander-level Forbidden Zerg roared, as if questioning who had stolen its corpse.

Subsequently, it continued to hunt down other Dao Ancestors.

And with the obstruction of Ye Tian's duplicate body, the group of Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain successfully evacuated, and they were not caught up by the commander-level taboo Zerg, so they survived.

After a long time.

The Dao Ancestors of the major bases almost returned to the base, and the Half-Step Domain Ancestors also returned, but they were injured one by one, and they obviously suffered a big loss.

However, the Forbidden Zerg did not completely catch up.

Their losses are even heavier, and if they continue to attack, if they lose too much, the race will be in danger.

The Forbidden Zerg can multiply quickly, there is no need to fight a one-time war, and it is their style to fight slowly.
